creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to alexvpetrov from comment #0)

> FreeBSD 13.2-STABLE stable/13-n256106-9397112d89df GENERIC amd64

stable/13 9397112d89df was 2023-08-19. Since then, you have various SSL-related changes, most recently <https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/log/?h=stable%2F13&qt=grep&q=ssl> with <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/baf69f6c997392cde9ae75d3ebc25a8201c7cc99> on 2023-10-05: 

>> libfetch: don't rely on ca_root_nss for certificate validation

Please try today's src 1369c31e7808 with suitably upgraded packages.
